public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as watch scout.
manner: Keeps attention split between conversation and the next necessary movement. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a watch scout still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of watch scout in and around Frozen Sentinel Pillars, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Frozen Sentinel Pillars workable through the obligations of watch scout while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep timing, safety, and route credibility aligned when any disruption threatens all three. Around Frozen Sentinel Pillars, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of watch scout visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kest Field needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Frozen Sentinel Pillars.
Kest Field can pull the party into chokepoints, timing failures, or rival claims over how movement should happen.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Kest Field lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Frozen Sentinel Pillars: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
